title: Clickup MCP Server for Claude
detailMarkdown:
# Clickup MCP Server for Claude
Task management and project tracking with ClickUp integration
**Category:** mcp
**Author:** hauptsacheNet
**Download trust:** first-party
**Tags:** `project-management` `clickup` `tasks` `productivity` `team-collaboration`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp add clickup --env CLICKUP_API_KEY=YOUR_KEY --env CLICKUP_TEAM_ID=YOUR_TEAM_ID -- npx -y @hauptsache.net/clickup-mcp && claude mcp list
```

## Config
```json
{
  "clickup": {
    "env": {
      "CLICKUP_API_KEY": "${CLICKUP_API_KEY}",
      "CLICKUP_TEAM_ID": "${CLICKUP_TEAM_ID}"
    },
    "args": [
      "-y",
      "@hauptsache.net/clickup-mcp"
    ],
    "command": "npx"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp add clickup --env CLICKUP_API_KEY=YOUR_KEY --env CLICKUP_TEAM_ID=YOUR_TEAM_ID -- npx -y @hauptsache.net/clickup-mcp && claude mcp list
